steps.title: Find the low-sales comparison
steps.content: The statement needs data showing that ColecoVision sold relatively few units. The correct completion must give ColecoVision's figure of about 2,000,000 units and compare it with a much larger figure for another system.

steps.title: Remove mismatched table data
steps.content:
• Choice A gives ColecoVision the wrong total and gives Game & Watch the wrong comparison figure.
  • Choice C uses the right ColecoVision total but assigns Game & Watch's much higher total to Intellivision.
  • Choice D gives ColecoVision the wrong total and makes a weaker Apple II comparison.
The answer is B.
